title: PULPA
lead: Frutero Club's reputation currency: it measures what you build, teach, and contribute. Climb tiers and open real opportunities. Here's how it arrives.

what.heading: What it is
what.body: Your work in the club — bounties, projects, mentorship — turns into $PULPA: a reputation that's yours and verifiable, that no one can take from you. The more you build, the higher you climb; the higher you climb, the more opens up.

now.title: Set up your profile and complete your first bounties
now.body: For now $PULPA is the direction, not the scoreboard: live counting isn't switched on yet. Complete the welcome bounties — they fill your profile and put you in line for the first distribution.

q3.title: First distribution — Q3 2026 Membership
q3.body: The first $PULPA is distributed with Frutero Club's Quarterly Membership (Jul–Aug–Sep 2026). The bounties you complete now count toward getting in.

next.title: $PULPA goes live
next.body: The scoreboard switches on: real-time scoring, the leaderboard, and rewards. Your $PULPA starts to count — and to open doors.
